concerns.detail: Deletion removes substantive allegations about specific advising practices—including denying normal leave, withholding recommendation letters and referrals, stringing students along (养鱼), and a quid pro quo arrangement with an Oxford PhD regarding authorship—while retaining vaguer character judgments. This appears to suppress concrete legitimate observations rather than perform cleanup of typos or off-topic content.
concerns.excerpt:
- 不让正常请假。不给写推荐信、不给内推、养鱼。
- 和某牛津博士PY交易 牺牲学生利益换取通讯。
